issues.description: Text says '[Opponent's Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. Duration must persist only during opponent's turn, not end at turn's end.
Missing condition to check if Character has 5000 power or more. Current DSL only checks for DON!! but not power threshold.
Target scope should be 'Self' (the Character being attacked) or 'AttackedCharacter', not 'OriginalTarget'. The effect applies to the Character that would be K.O.'d.
